messages.content: I also advised to keep one traffic campaign. We discussed that may will be confusing for the audience the so different products but since is not working the division he was on to try something new. can you write that in formal english?

I also recommended maintaining a single traffic campaign. We discussed that multiple campaigns featuring such diverse products might confuse the audience. However, since the division is not yielding satisfactory results, he has decided to explore alternative approaches.
the advertiser made clear that he never knows  the overall marketing budget
The advertiser explicitly stated that they are not aware of the overall marketing budget.
I also recommended a remarketing campaign retargeting the last 14 days add to cart and view content.
I also advised implementing a remarketing campaign that targets users who have recently added items to their cart or viewed specific content within the past 14 days.
almost 8k
The suggested remarketing campaign is estimated to target an audience of nearly 8,000 potential customers.

September they will have 20% more budget.
I recommended mobile friendly video in order to increase the CTR in ‘’traffic’‘ campaigns  
they care more about page viewers  they are satisficed with results of ‘’traffic’‘. 
leads are not qualitative. I recommended ‘’AB testing’‘ for audience as august is a good month for that.

In September, they will have a 20% increase in their marketing budget. I proposed utilizing mobile-friendly videos to enhance the click-through rate (CTR) in their "traffic" campaigns. They prioritize attracting page viewers and are content with the performance of their "traffic" campaigns. However, they have expressed concerns about the quality of leads generated. Consequently, I suggested implementing "AB testing" to experiment with different audience segments, as August presents a favorable opportunity for such tests.
Next time we should focus on: Increasing CTR, Remarketing the page viewers

Moving forward, it is recommended to focus on two main objectives: increasing the click-through rate (CTR) and implementing remarketing strategies to target the page viewers. These approaches can help optimize campaign performance and effectively engage with potential customers who have shown interest in the website.

Firstly, I booked appointment with Technical Pros to install ''capi''.  I pitched ''Lets Talk Numbers'' . They wanted to create campaigns for increasing the page likes in Facebook and  in general engagement on Facebook and Instagram. I also informed them they they should keep an eye on CTR since they focus on Traffic Campaigns. Advertiser followed my guidance of previous conversations we had in the past on using more Mobile Friendly Video.  Next time we focus more on ''Leads'' campaigns.

Firstly, I have scheduled an appointment with Technical Pros to install the "capi" system as discussed. During our discussion, I presented the idea of "Let's Talk Numbers" and the advertiser expressed interest in creating campaigns to increase page likes on Facebook and overall engagement on both Facebook and Instagram platforms. I also reminded them to monitor the click-through rate (CTR) closely since they have been prioritizing Traffic Campaigns. The advertiser followed my previous advice and incorporated more mobile-friendly videos into their campaigns. Moving forward, it is recommended to shift focus towards "Leads" campaigns in order to maximize conversions.
He will be on vacation until 28 of August.
The advertiser has informed that they will be on vacation until August 28th.

We created a b2b ''traffic'' campaign with some interests. The idea is to create 1 b2b campaign with general interests for investors like ''Business decision-makers'' and one with interests about optics. The creative will be video mobile friendly with the existed francize owners talking about their experience.

We have successfully created a B2B "traffic" campaign targeting specific interests. The strategy involves developing two separate B2B campaigns, one with general interests aimed at investors and business decision-makers, and another focused on optics-related interests. To enhance engagement, we have designed mobile-friendly video creatives featuring existing franchise owners sharing their experiences. This approach aims to capture the attention of the target audience and effectively promote the business.
Next time we will analyze the data. For a Remarketing Strategy we could use leads.

Next time, it is advisable to conduct a thorough analysis of the data gathered. This will help us gain valuable insights into the performance of the campaigns and identify areas for improvement. Additionally, for the remarketing strategy, we can consider using leads as a targeting criterion. By remarketing to individuals who have already expressed interest in the brand or taken a specific action, we can potentially increase conversions and drive more qualified traffic to the website.
